name: FeatureRequest
description: Public feature request and feedback API for projects and issues.

notes: Token is created as `fr_<secret>`; only token_prefix is returned in list responses.
Read-only tokens (`can_write=false`) are rejected with 403 on write methods.
Primarily used by web authentication routes and normal browser sessions.
CSRF still applies for state-changing endpoints.

rate_limiting.note: No explicit request-rate limit middleware is configured in repository code.

dependency_risks: OpenAI key required for some moderation flows; moderation failures can return 503.
Stripe is optional until billing routes are used.

tools.name: health
tools.description: API health check

tools.name: list_billing_plans
tools.description: Return free/pro plan catalog.

tools.name: create_checkout_session
tools.description: Create a Stripe checkout session for pro plan.

tools.name: list_api_tokens
tools.description: List active API tokens for current user.

tools.name: create_api_token
tools.description: Create API token; full token shown once at creation.

tools.name: revoke_api_token
tools.description: Revoke a token by id.

tools.name: get_agent_token_status
tools.description: Read single-agent token status for current user.

tools.name: connect_agent_token
tools.description: Create agent token if missing, otherwise rotate and return fresh token + prompt.

tools.name: refresh_agent_token
tools.description: Rotate existing single agent token and return fresh token + prompt.

tools.name: list_my_projects
tools.description: List projects owned by current authenticated user.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Create project. Returns 403 if owner reached plan limit.

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get a project by ID; only if owner.

tools.name: update_project
tools.description: Update name/tagline/url for owned project only.

tools.name: delete_project
tools.description: Delete owned project.

tools.name: list_owner_projects
tools.description: List all projects for a public owner.

tools.name: list_featured_projects
tools.description: List featured projects by issue volume, `limit` capped at 12.

tools.name: list_owner_issues
tools.description: List issues for an owner, optional filters: project_slug, issue_type, status, priority.
notes: Issue/project-specific filters are validated by enum/range.

tools.name: list_project_issues
tools.description: List issues for owner/project with optional filters.

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create issue and run moderation.

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get issue detail by id.

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update issue title/description/status/priority. Only owner or author.

tools.name: toggle_issue_upvote
tools.description: Toggle issue upvote by authenticated user.

tools.name: list_issue_comments
tools.description: List comments for a given issue.

tools.name: create_issue_comment
tools.description: Create comment and run moderation.

tools.name: create_owner_message
tools.description: Send message to owner inbox; moderation applies.

tools.name: list_my_messages
tools.description: List inbox messages sent to or sent by current user.

tools.name: web_sign_in
tools.description: Sign in by email/handle or request passwordless email link.

tools.name: web_sign_up
tools.description: Create account and send signup magic link.

tools.name: web_sign_out
tools.description: Logout current session.

tools.name: web_me
tools.description: Return current session profile.

tools.name: stripe_webhook
tools.description: Stripe event handler for subscription lifecycle.

tools.name: web_magic_link
tools.description: Consumes sesame magic-link token and logs user in.
